rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.206, which governs open meetings for an advisory committee under Chapter 551, Government Code.
quote: Meetings of the advisory committee are subject to Chapter 551, Government Code.
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns open meetings requirements for an advisory committee and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
